description_long: This is a shallow, round ceramic plate with a slightly raised rim and a white base color, featuring a blue edge. The plate contains a variety of food items, including what appears to be sliced bananas, green fruit pieces (possibly kiwi), and a brownish-red item that could be a slice of sausage or similar food, all arranged on a baked, golden-brown pastry or bread base. The food items are visually distinct and add a colorful, appetizing appearance to the plate. There is a red tag or label with black numbers partially visible and attached to the side of the plate, suggesting it may be part of a display or inventory. The plate's surface is smooth and glossy, typical of glazed ceramic kitchenware. No visible cracks or chips are present, and the plate appears clean and well-maintained.
description: A white ceramic plate with a blue rim, holding a colorful assortment of food items atop a baked pastry, and featuring a red tag on the side.
description_view_0: The plate is seen from above, clearly showing the food arrangement and the blue rim, with the red tag partially visible on the right.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the plate's shallow depth and the red tag, which is more prominently visible on the right edge.
description_view_2: The plate is viewed from the opposite side, showing the underside curve and the red tag extending outward, with less detail of the food visible.
description_view_3: A slightly angled view showing the plate's rim, the food contents, and the red tag extending from the left side.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: A red tag with black numbers is visible on the side of the plate.
attribute_surrounding_context: A red tag is attached to the plate, but no other environmental context is visible.
